titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 67: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 67. (A.R. No. 223 of 1915.) BRAHMADĒSAM, CHEYYAR TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Chandramauḷīśvara temple.

p.hi: Mahārāja, who took the head of Vīrapāṇḍya (Āditya II) Year 2: 962 A.D.

summary.p: Records that an individual Iḷanāṅgūr alias Alaṅkāracheṭṭi, the son of Maṅgalapriyaṉ Kalivilaṅgi, a merchant of Tiruvēgambachchēri in Rājamalla-chaturvēdimaṅgalam endowed fifteen kaḻañju of gold for burning a perpetual lamp to Śrī Pōndaipperumānaḍigaḷ. The gaṇapperumakkaḷ of the temple (who were entrusted with the gold gifted) were to burn the lamp out of the interest on the gifted amount.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . virapāṇṭiyaṉait
talaikoṇṭa koma(ā)hārājaṟku yāṇṭu 2āvatu rājamalla ccaturvetimaṅkalattu
tiruvekampacceri vyāpāri maṅkalapriyaṉ kalivilaṅki makaṉ Iḷanāṅkūr Ākiya Ala
ṅkāra ceṭṭi śripontaip perumāṉaṭikaḷukku Oru nuntāviḷakkukku vaiytta poṉ pati
ṉaiṅ kaḻañcu Ippoṉ patiṉaiṅ kaḻañcālum vanta vraddhip poṉ koṇṭu śriko
yil kaṇapperumakkaḷe cantrātityavarai Erippatāka vaiytteṉ Alaṅkāra ceṭṭi
yeṉ Iddhammam rakṣippār śripātam Eṉṟalai melaṉa Aṟam veṟka Aṟamallatu tu
ṇaiyillai . §
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 67 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
